reasoning: The control SA-9(6) focuses on the management and rotation of cryptographic keys, which is applicable to Kubernetes in the context of managing secrets and etcd encryption. Kubernetes supports encryption at rest for secrets and etcd, which aligns with the requirement to maintain control over cryptographic keys. Additionally, configuring a rotation policy for secrets can be implemented through external secret management solutions integrated with Kubernetes. Ensuring etcd communication is secured with TLS further supports the control's objectives.
title: External System Services - External system services | organization - controlled cryptographic keys maintain
